mapper.select:
/* OTCSADetail.saWithholdingSearch */
SELECT A.SA_NO , A.WTH_FLAG , A.WTH_ISSUE_DATE , A.WTH_NAT_CODE , A.WTH_HIRE_BAL_AMT , A.WTH_HIRE_BAL_REDUCE_RATE , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.WTH_NAT_CODE ) AS WTH_NAT_NAME FROM OTC_SA_HEAD A WHERE A.SA_NO = #{saNo}

/* OTCSADetail.saWithholdingSearch */
SELECT NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A001' , 'A006' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) ON_HIRE , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A002' , 'A007' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) ON_HIRE_ADD , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS BONUS FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'G001' , 'G003' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) BONUS , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS BONUSADD FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'G002' , 'G004' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) BONUS_ADD , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS OFFHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'H001' , 'H009' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) OFF_HIRE , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS OFFHIREADD FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'H002' , 'H010' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) OFF_HIRE_ADD , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS SPEED FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'I003' , 'I071' , 'I004' , 'I072' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) SPEED , NVL( ( SELECT SUM( NVL( USD_SA_AMT , 0 ) ) AS SPEEDADD FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'I005' , 'I073' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) SPEED_CLAIM_ADD FROM DUAL

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch */
SELECT V.* , ACC_NAME_FUNC( V.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_NAME FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code = 'I001' ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch1 */
SELECT A.CP_ITEM_NO , A.BLST_BONUS , A.CVE , A.VOY_NO , A.APLY_TIME_FLAG , A.CNTR_NO , A.LAY_CAN_FROM_DATE , A.CNTR_ACC_CODE , A.LAY_CAN_TO_DATE , A.BANK_NAT_CODE , A.OP_TEAM_CODE , A.WTH_TAX_FLAG , A.REDLY_NOTICE1 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE , A.REDLY_NOTICE2 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE2 , A.REDLY_NOTICE3 , A.FO_PRICE , A.REDLY_NOTICE4 , A.ILOHC , A.REDLY_NOTICE5 , A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE6 , A.NAT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE7 , A.BROK_ACC_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE8 , A.REDLY_NOTICE9 , A.VSL_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE10 , A.DO_PRICE , A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 , A.SYS_CRE_DATE , A.SYS_CRE_USER_ID , A.SYS_UPD_DATE , A.SYS_UPD_USER_ID , A.BANK_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.BANK_NAT_CODE ) AS BANK_NAT_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.NAT_CODE ) AS NAT_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.OP_TEAM_CODE ) AS OP_TEAM_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE ) AS CNTR_TEAM_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS CNTR_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME2 , VSL_NAME_FUNC( A.VSL_CODE ) AS VSL_NAME , Cntr_Name_Func( A.CNTR_NO ) AS CNTR_NAME , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_NAT , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_NAT2 , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) ) AS ACC_NAT_NAME FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A WHERE A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInOutCode}

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch2 */
SELECT A.CP_ITEM_NO , A.BLST_BONUS , A.CVE , A.VOY_NO , A.APLY_TIME_FLAG , A.CNTR_NO , A.LAY_CAN_FROM_DATE , A.CNTR_ACC_CODE , A.LAY_CAN_TO_DATE , A.BANK_NAT_CODE , A.OP_TEAM_CODE , A.WTH_TAX_FLAG , A.REDLY_NOTICE1 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE , A.REDLY_NOTICE2 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE2 , A.REDLY_NOTICE3 , A.FO_PRICE , A.REDLY_NOTICE4 , A.ILOHC , A.REDLY_NOTICE5 , A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE6 , A.NAT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE7 , A.BROK_ACC_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE8 , A.REDLY_NOTICE9 , A.VSL_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE10 , A.DO_PRICE , A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 , A.SYS_CRE_DATE , A.SYS_CRE_USER_ID , A.SYS_UPD_DATE , A.SYS_UPD_USER_ID , A.BANK_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.BANK_NAT_CODE ) AS BANK_NAT_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.NAT_CODE ) AS NAT_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.OP_TEAM_CODE ) AS OP_TEAM_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE ) AS CNTR_TEAM_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS CNTR_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME2 , VSL_NAME_FUNC( A.VSL_CODE ) AS VSL_NAME , Cntr_Name_Func( A.CNTR_NO ) AS CNTR_NAME , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_NAT , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_NAT2 , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) ) AS ACC_NAT_NAME FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A WHERE A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInOutCode}

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch3 */
SELECT (SELECT SUM (USD_SA_AMT) AS ONHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE = 'A001' GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE) AS ONHIRE FROM dual

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch4 */
SELECT ( NVL( ( SELECT SUM ( USD_SA_AMT ) AS ONHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A001' , 'A006' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) +NVL( ( SELECT SUM ( USD_SA_AMT ) AS OFFHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'G001' , 'G003' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ), 0 ) - NVL( ( SELECT SUM ( USD_SA_AMT ) AS OFFHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'H001' , 'H009' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) - NVL( ( SELECT SUM ( USD_SA_AMT ) AS SPEED FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'I003' , 'I071' , 'I004' , 'I072' ) GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) +NVL( ( SELECT SUM( USD_SA_AMT ) AS OUTOFHIRE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A004' , 'A008' ) AND BROK_RESERV_FLAG = 'Y' GROUP BY TRSACT_CODE ) , 0 ) ) AS HIRE FROM DUAL

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACSearch5 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC('TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG) TAX_CODE_NAME, V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'I002' , 'I003' , 'I071' , 'I004' , 'I072' , 'I005' , 'I073' , 'I006' , 'I007' , 'N001' , 'N002' ) ORDER BY V.GROUP_SEQ , V.TRSACT_CODE

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleRsvSearch */
select a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, a.usd_sa_amt as entered_amt, a.usd_sa_amt as usd_amt, a.krw_sa_amt as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '210802' , '210803' , '210809' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleRsvSearch1 */
select a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, a.usd_sa_amt as entered_amt, a.usd_sa_amt as usd_amt, a.krw_sa_amt as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '110902' , '110903' , '110907' , '110912' , '110913' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleRsvSearch */
select a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, a.usd_sa_amt as entered_amt, a.usd_sa_amt as usd_amt, a.krw_sa_amt as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code = '210805'

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleApSearch */
select a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, a.usd_sa_amt as entered_amt, a.usd_sa_amt as usd_amt, a.krw_sa_amt as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '210403' , '210405' , '210402' , '210701' , '210499' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleApSearch1 */
select a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, a.usd_sa_amt as entered_amt, a.usd_sa_amt as usd_amt, a.krw_sa_amt as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '110502' , '110503' , '110599' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'A001' , 'A002' , 'A006' , 'A007' ) ORDER BY V.GROUP_SEQ , V.TRSACT_CODE

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect1 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code ='A003' ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect */
SELECT VAT_NO , S_SEQ , SEQ , CNT , S_TITLE , ITEM_DESC , TRSACT_CODE , TAX_CODE_ID , KRW_BASE_AMT , KRW_VAT_AMT FROM ( SELECT D.VAT_NO , D.S_SEQ , D.SEQ , MAX( CNT ) CNT , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , 'S.TOTAL' , MAX( D.VAT_INVOICE_NO ) ) S_TITLE , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , ' ' , MAX( D.ITEM_DESC ) ) ITEM_DESC , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , ' ' , MAX( D.TRSACT_CODE ) ) TRSACT_CODE , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , ' ' , MAX( D.TAX_CODE_ID ) ) TAX_CODE_ID , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , SUM( D.KRW_BASE_AMT ) , MAX( D.KRW_BASE_AMT ) ) AS KRW_BASE_AMT , DECODE( D.SEQ , 2 , SUM( D.KRW_VAT_AMT ) , MAX( D.KRW_VAT_AMT ) ) AS KRW_VAT_AMT FROM ( SELECT M.* , S.SEQ , DECODE( S.SEQ , 1 , M.VAT_SEQ , 9999 ) S_SEQ FROM ( SELECT TH.VAT_NO , TH.VAT_INVOICE_NO , TD.VAT_SEQ , TD.ITEM_DESC , TD.TRSACT_CODE , SUBSTR( TH.TAX_CODE_ID , 4 , 1 ) AS TAX_CODE_ID , TD.KRW_BASE_AMT , TD.KRW_VAT_AMT , MAX( TD.VAT_SEQ ) OVER ( PARTITION BY TH.DOCU_NO ) CNT FROM CCD_TAX_HEAD TH , CCD_TAX_DETAIL TD WHERE TH.VAT_NO = TD.VAT_NO AND TH.DEL_FLAG = 'N' AND TH.VAT_TYPE_CODE = 'S1' AND TH.DOCU_NO = #{org_sa_no} ) M , SOM_SEQ_DUAL S WHERE S.SEQ <= 2 ) D GROUP BY D.VAT_NO , D.S_SEQ , D.SEQ ) WHERE SEQ = 1 OR ( SEQ = 2 AND CNT > 1 ) ORDER BY VAT_NO , SEQ , S_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect5 */
select v.gl_date adv_gl_date from EAR_IF_receipt_BALANCE_V V , OTC_SA_DETAIL D WHERE V.RECEIPT_NUMBER = D.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO AND D.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND D.STL_GL_ACC_CODE = 210701

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect6 */
select /*+ opt_param( '_optimizer_join_factorization', 'FALSE' ) */ max( b.gl_date ) gl_date from ( select /*+ leading( a ) no_merge( b ) use_nl( b ) push_pred( b ) no_merge( b.aida_mc ) push_pred( b.aida_mc ) no_merge( b.vnd ) push_pred( b.vnd ) no_merge( b.PENDING ) push_pred( b.PENDING ) no_merge( b.AI_USD ) push_pred( b.AI_USD ) */ b.gl_date from otc_sa_detail a , ear_if_invoice_balance_v b where to_char( a.stl_erp_slip_no ) = invoice_number and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_erp_slip_no is not null union all select v.gl_Date from otc_sa_detail a , ear_if_trx_balance_v v where to_char( a.stl_erp_slip_no ) = TRX_NUMBER and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_erp_slip_no is not null union all select v.gl_date from otc_sa_detail a , ear_if_receipt_balance_v v where to_char( a.stl_erp_slip_no ) = RECEIPT_NUMBER and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_erp_slip_no is not null ) b

/* OTCSADetail.saOnHireSelect7 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'A004' , 'A005' , 'A008' , 'A009' ) ORDER BY V.GROUP_SEQ , V.TRSACT_CODE
mapper.update:
/* OTCSADetail.saWthTaxAmtUpdate */
UPDATE OTC_SA_DETAIL A SET ( A.USD_SA_AMT , A.LOC_SA_AMT , A.KRW_SA_AMT ) = ( SELECT SUM( A.USD_SA_AMT ) , SUM( A.LOC_SA_AMT ) , SUM( A.KRW_SA_AMT ) FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL A WHERE A.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND A.TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'M001' , 'M002' ) ) WHERE A.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND A.TRSACT_CODE = 'M004'
mapper.select:
/* OTCSADetail.saOffHireSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'H005' , 'H011' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saOffHireSelect1 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'H001' , 'H002' , 'H009' , 'H010' , 'H003' , 'H004' , 'H006' , 'H007' , 'H008' ) ORDER BY V.GROUP_SEQ , V.TRSACT_CODE

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'B001' , 'B002' , 'B003' , 'B004' , 'B005' , 'B006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'C001' , 'C002' , 'C003' , 'C004' , 'C005' , 'C006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerSelect_20080722 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'B001' , 'B002' , 'B003' , 'B004' , 'C001' , 'C002' , 'C003' , 'C004' , 'B005' , 'B006' , 'C005' , 'C006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerBODSelect_20080723 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'B001' , 'B002' , 'B003' , 'B004' , 'B005' , 'B006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerBODSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'B001' , 'B002' , 'B003' , 'B004' , 'B005' , 'B006' ) ORDER BY V.GROUP_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerBORSelect_20080723 */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'C001' , 'C002' , 'C003' , 'C004' , 'C005' , 'C006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerBORSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'C001' , 'C002' , 'C003' , 'C004' , 'C005' , 'C006' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerBehalfSelect */
SELECT COMCODE_INFO_FUNC( 'TAX_CODE', V.TAX_CODE_FLAG ) TAX_CODE_NAME , V.* FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code IN ( 'E001' , 'E002' , 'E003' , 'E004' ) ORDER BY V.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saBunkerFirstBODSelect */
SELECT D.TRSACT_CODE , D.BNK_QTY , D.BNK_PRC , DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY H.SA_NO, D.GROUP_SEQ ) AS GROUP_SEQ FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL D , OTC_SA_HEAD H WHERE H.SA_NO = D.SA_NO AND H.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND H.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND H.CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' AND DECODE( H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , 'R' , 'O' , H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE ) = #{tcFlag} AND D.TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'B001' , 'B002' , 'B003' , 'B004' , 'B005' , 'B006' ) ORDER BY D.SA_SEQ

/* OTCSADetail.saOpenItemSearch */
select a.* , (nvl(a.entered_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.entered_pending_amount,0)) as entered_amt, (nvl(a.usd_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.usd_pending_amount,0)) as usd_amt, (nvl(a.krw_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.krw_pending_amount,0)) as won_amt from ear_if_invoice_balance_v a
select a.* , (nvl(a.entered_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.entered_pending_amount,0)) as entered_amt, (nvl(a.usd_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.usd_pending_amount,0)) as usd_amt, (nvl(a.krw_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.krw_pending_amount,0)) as won_amt from ear_if_trx_balance_v a
SELECT * FROM (select a.EXCHANGE_RATE_KRW, a.EXCHANGE_RATE_USD, a.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_KRW, a.SEGMENT4 as SEGMENT4 , a.SEGMENT5 as SEGMENT5, a.CURRENCY_CODE as CURRENCY_CODE, a.SEGMENT2 as SEGMENT2, a.PORT_CODE as PORT_CODE , a.VENDOR_NAME as CUSTOMER_NAME, a.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID as CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID , a.INVOICE_NUMBER as INVOICE_NUMBER, a.SEGMENT3 as SEGMENT3 , a.COMMENTS as COMMENTS , a.GL_DATE , (nvl(a.entered_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.entered_pending_amount,0)) as entered_amt, (nvl(a.usd_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.usd_pending_amount,0)) as usd_amt, (nvl(a.krw_balance_amount,0)- nvl(a.krw_pending_amount,0)) as won_amt from ear_if_invoice_balance_v a where 1= 1 and a.segment4 > ' '
and a.gl_date <= to_date(#{postingDate} ,'yyyymmdd')
and a.segment3 IN ( '210802' ,'210805' ,'210809','210405', '210701','210402','210803','210403' ,'210809','210405','210701' ,'210499', '110599')
and a.segment3 IN ( '210802' ,'210805' ,'210809','210405', '210701','210402' ,'210499', '110599')
and a.segment3 IN ( '210803','210403' ,'210809','210405','210701','210499, '110599' )
and a.segment3 in ('210802' ,'210803','210809')
and a.segment3 in ('210802','210809')
and a.segment3 in ('210803','210809')
and a.segment3 = '210805'
and a.segment3 IN ('210402' ,'210405','210701', '210403','210499' )
and a.segment3 IN ('210402' ,'210405','210701', '210499')
and a.segment3 IN ('210403' ,'210405','210701','210499' )
and a.segment3 IN ('110902' , '110912', '110903', '110913' )
and a.segment3 IN ('110902' , '110912', '110913')
and a.segment3 IN ('110903' , '110912', '110913')
and a.segment3 IN ( '110503', '110502' ,'110599')
and a.segment3 IN ('110503','110599')
and a.segment3 IN ('110502', '110599')
and a.segment4 = #{vslCode}
and a.segment5 = #{voyNo}
and a.customer_unique_id = #{accCode}
and ( a.segment2 = #{teamCode} or a.new_dept_code = #{teamCode} )
and ( a.source_system <> 'CNTR' or ( a.source_system = 'CNTR' and substr( a.source_trx_number , 9 , 4 ) IN ( 'CFDE' , 'CADE' , 'CDDE' ) ) ) and ( ( nvl( a.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) > 0 OR ( nvl( a.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) < 0 )
UNION ALL select a.EXCHANGE_RATE_KRW , a.EXCHANGE_RATE_USD , a.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_KRW , a.SEGMENT4 as SEGMENT4 , a.SEGMENT5 as SEGMENT5 , a.CURRENCY_CODE as CURRENCY_CODE , a.SEGMENT2 as SEGMENT2 , a.PORT_CODE as PORT_CODE , a.CUSTOMER_NAME as CUSTOMER_NAME , a.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID as CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID , a.TRX_NUMBER as INVOICE_NUMBER , a.SEGMENT3 as SEGMENT3 , a.COMMENTS as COMMENTS , a.GL_DATE , ( nvl( a.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as entered_amt , ( nvl( a.usd_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.usd_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , ( nvl( a.krw_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.krw_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as won_amt from ear_if_trx_balance_v a where 1= 1 and a.segment4 > ' '
and a.gl_date <= to_date( #{postingDate} , 'yyyymmdd' )
and a.segment3 IN ( '110902' , '110912' , '110503' , '110903' , '110502' , '110913' , '110599' )
and a.segment3 IN ( '110902' , '110912' , '110503' , '110913' , '110599' )
and a.segment3 IN ( '110903' , '110912' , '110502' , '110913' , '110599' )
and a.segment4 = #{vslCode}
and a.segment5 = #{voyNo}
and a.customer_unique_id = #{accCode}
and ( a.segment2 = #{teamCode} or a.new_dept_code = #{teamCode} )
and ( a.source_system <> 'CNTR' or ( a.source_system = 'CNTR' and substr( a.source_trx_number , 9 , 4 ) IN ( 'CFDE' , 'CADE' , 'CDDE' ) ) ) and ( ( nvl( a.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) > 0 OR ( nvl( a.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( a.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) < 0 ) )

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch1 */
select DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'A006','A001','A007','A002', 'A008','A004','A009','A005', 'H009','H001','H010','H002', b.trsact_code ) trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt , sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c WHERE b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and ((b.trsact_code between 'A001' and 'H011') OR b.trsact_code = 'M004') group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag order by DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'A006','A001','A007','A002', 'A008','A004','A009','A005', 'H009','H001','H010','H002', b.trsact_code )

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch2 */
select DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'I071','I003','I072','I004','I072','I005', b.trsact_code ) trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, b.remark, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt , sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c WHERE b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and b.trsact_code IN ('I001','I002', 'I003','I004','I005','I071','I072','I073', 'I006','I007', 'I008','I009','I010','I011','I012','I013','I014','I015','I016','I017','I018','I019','I020','I021','I022','I023','I024','I025','I026','I027','I028','I029','I030','I031','I032','I033','I034','I035','I036','I037','I038','I039','I040','I041','I042','I043','I044','I045','I046','I047','I048','I049','I050','I051','I052','I053','I054','J001','J002','J003','J004','J005','J006','J007','J008','J009','J010','K001','K002','K003','K004','K005','K006','K007','M005','M006','M007','M008','N001','N002', 'I074','I075','J008','J009','J011','J012') group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag ,b.remark order by DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'I071','I003','I072','I004','I072','I005', b.trsact_code )

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch */
select b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt , sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c WHERE b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and b.trsact_code > 'N002' group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag order by b.trsact_code

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch4 */
SELECT b.sa_no , sum( nvl( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , sum( nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002') group by b.sa_no

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch5 */
select b.due_date, b.pymt_term, b.terms_date, b.pymt_hold_flag, b.pymt_meth,nvl(b.bank_acc_id,0) as bank_acc_id, b.bank_acc_desc, NVL( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) +nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) as usd_amt , nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) +nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and b.trsact_code = 'L002' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode}

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch6 */
select DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'A006','A001','A007','A002', 'A008','A004','A009','A005', 'H009','H001','H010','H002', b.trsact_code ) trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c WHERE b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and ((b.trsact_code between 'A001' and 'H011') OR b.trsact_code in ('M001','M002')) group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag order by DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'A006','A001','A007','A002', 'A008','A004','A009','A005', 'H009','H001','H010','H002', b.trsact_code )

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch */
select DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'I071','I003','I072','I004','I072','I005', b.trsact_code ) trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, b.remark, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c WHERE b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and b.trsact_code IN ('I001', 'I002', 'I003','I004','I005','I071','I072','I073', 'I006','I007', 'I008','I009','I010','I011','I012','I013','I014','I015','I016','I017','I018','I019','I020','I021','I022','I023','I024','I025','I026','I027','I028','I029','I030','I031','I032','I033','I034','I035','I036','I037','I038','I039','I040','I041','I042','I043','I044','I045','I046','I047','I048','I049','I050','I051','I052','I053','I054','J001','J002','J003','J004','J005','J006','J007','J008','J009','J010','K001','K002','K003','K004','K005','K006','K007','M005','M006','M007','M008','N001','N002', 'I074','I075','J008','J009','J011','J012') group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag ,b.remark order by DECODE(b.trsact_code, 'I071','I003','I072','I004','I072','I005', b.trsact_code )

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch8 */
select b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name ,b.vat_flag, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) as usd_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)) as krw_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_vat_sa_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_vat_sa_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and b.trsact_code > 'N002' group by b.trsact_code, c.trsact_name, b.vat_flag order by b.trsact_code

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch9 */
select b.sa_no, sum(nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0)) + sum(nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0)) as usd_amt, sum(nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0))+ sum(nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0)) as krw_amt from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002') group by b.sa_no

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckSearch10 */
select b.due_date, b.pymt_term, b.terms_date, b.pymt_hold_flag, b.pymt_meth,nvl(b.bank_acc_id,0) as bank_acc_id, b.bank_acc_desc, nvl(b.usd_sa_amt,0) + nvl(b.usd_vat_sa_amt,0) as usd_amt, nvl(b.krw_sa_amt,0)+ nvl(b.krw_vat_sa_amt,0) as krw_amt, court_flag, court_admit_no from otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where b.sa_no = #{sa_no} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.own_vsl_category = #{chtInOutCode} and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and b.trsact_code ='L001'

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckCalculation */
select SUM( nvl( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , sum( nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_head a, otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and a.cht_in_out_code = c.own_vsl_category and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002')

/* OTCSADetail.saBalanceCheckCalculation1 */
SELECT sum( nvl( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , sum( nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_head a, otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and a.cht_in_out_code = c.own_vsl_category and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002')

/* OTCSADetail.saDiffKrwAmtCalculation */
SELECT sum( decode( c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit , '1' , nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) +nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) , 0 ) ) - sum( decode( c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit , '2' , nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) +nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) , 0 ) ) as diff_krw_amt from otc_sa_head a , otc_sa_detail b , ccd_trsact_type_m c where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and a.cht_in_out_code = c.own_vsl_category

/* OTCSADetail.saDetailWithholdHireCal */
SELECT SA_NO , MIN( FROM_DATE ) as from_date , MAX( TO_DATE ) as to_date , SUM( NVL( SA_RATE_DUR , 0 ) ) as rate_dur , SUM( NVL( SA_RATE , 0 ) ) as rate FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL WHERE SA_NO = #{saNo} AND TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A001' , 'A006' ) GROUP BY SA_NO

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACInitSearch */
SELECT A.CP_ITEM_NO , A.BLST_BONUS , A.CVE , A.VOY_NO , A.APLY_TIME_FLAG , A.CNTR_NO , A.LAY_CAN_FROM_DATE , A.CNTR_ACC_CODE , A.LAY_CAN_TO_DATE , A.BANK_NAT_CODE , A.OP_TEAM_CODE , A.WTH_TAX_FLAG , A.REDLY_NOTICE1 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE , A.REDLY_NOTICE2 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE2 , A.REDLY_NOTICE3 , A.FO_PRICE , A.REDLY_NOTICE4 , A.ILOHC , A.REDLY_NOTICE5 , A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE6 , A.NAT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE7 , A.BROK_ACC_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE8 , A.REDLY_NOTICE9 , A.VSL_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE10 , A.DO_PRICE , A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 , A.SYS_CRE_DATE , A.SYS_CRE_USER_ID , A.SYS_UPD_DATE , A.SYS_UPD_USER_ID , A.BANK_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.BANK_NAT_CODE ) AS BANK_NAT_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.NAT_CODE ) AS NAT_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.OP_TEAM_CODE ) AS OP_TEAM_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE ) AS CNTR_TEAM_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS CNTR_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME2 , VSL_NAME_FUNC( A.VSL_CODE ) AS VSL_NAME , Cntr_Name_Func( A.CNTR_NO ) AS CNTR_NAME , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_NAT , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_NAT2 , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) ) AS ACC_NAT_NAME FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A WHERE A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtinCd}

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACInitSearch1 */
SELECT A.FO_PRICE , A.DO_PRICE , A.BROK_ACC_CODE , A.BROK_COMM_RATE , ACC_NAME_FUNC(A.BROK_ACC_CODE) AS BROK_ACC_NAME , A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE2 , ACC_NAME_FUNC(A.BROK_ACC_CODE2) AS BROK_ACC_NAME2 , B.CP_DATE , B.FROM_DATE , B.TO_DATE , B.DAY_HIRE , B.HIRE_DUR , B.ADDR_COMM_RATE , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_NAT , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_NAT2 FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A , OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL B WHERE A.CP_ITEM_NO = B.CP_ITEM_NO AND A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtinCd} AND B.CP_ITEM_SEQ = ( SELECT MIN( CP_ITEM_SEQ ) FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL WHERE CP_ITEM_NO = A.CP_ITEM_NO )

/* OTCSADetail.saOffHireInitSelect */
SELECT A.* , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , B.CP_DATE , B.FROM_DATE , B.TO_DATE , B.DAY_HIRE , B.HIRE_DUR , B.ADDR_COMM_RATE FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A , OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL B WHERE A.CP_ITEM_NO = B.CP_ITEM_NO AND A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInCode} AND B.CP_ITEM_SEQ = ( SELECT MIN( CP_ITEM_SEQ ) FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL WHERE CP_ITEM_NO = A.CP_ITEM_NO )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleRsvUnSubmitSearch */
select /*+ NO_MERGE(D) NO_MERGE(D.aida_mc) PUSH_PRED(D.aida_mc) NO_MERGE(D.AI_USD) PUSH_PRED(D.AI_USD) */ d.* , a.stl_cntr_acc_code,c.op_team_code, c.cntr_team_code, ACC_NAME_FUNC(a.stl_cntr_acc_code) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code, d.gl_date, (nvl(d.entered_balance_amount,0)- nvl(d.entered_pending_amount,0)) as entered_amt, (nvl(d.usd_balance_amount,0)- nvl(d.usd_pending_amount,0)) as usd_amt, (nvl(d.krw_balance_amount,0)- nvl(d.krw_pending_amount,0)) as won_amt, a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no, a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct, c.sa_no, a.stl_flag, a.stl_vsl_code, a.stl_voy_no, a.stl_erp_slip_no, a.usd_sa_amt, a.loc_sa_amt, a.krw_sa_amt, a.stl_port_code, a.remark, a.curcy_code, a.exc_date, a.exc_rate_type, a.usd_exc_rate, a.loc_exc_rate,a.usd_loc_rate, a.due_date, a.terms_date, a.pymt_term, a.pymt_hold_flag from EAR_IF_INVOICE_BALANCE_V d, otc_sa_head c, otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO = d.INVOICE_NUMBER AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '210802' , '210803' , '210809' )

SELECT /*+ PUSH_PRED(D) */ , A.STL_CNTR_ACC_CODE , C.OP_TEAM_CODE , C.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , ACC_NAME_FUNC(A.STL_CNTR_ACC_CODE) AS STL_ACC_NAME , A.CURCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE , (NVL(D.ENTERED_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.ENTERED_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS ENTERED_AMT , (NVL(D.USD_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.USD_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS USD_AMT , (NVL(D.KRW_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.KRW_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS WON_AMT , A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO AS SLIP_NO , A.STL_GL_ACC_CODE AS GL_ACCT , C.SA_NO, A.STL_FLAG , A.STL_VSL_CODE , A.STL_VOY_NO , A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO , A.USD_SA_AMT , A.LOC_SA_AMT , A.KRW_SA_AMT , A.STL_PORT_CODE , A.REMARK , A.CURCY_CODE , A.EXC_DATE , A.EXC_RATE_TYPE , A.USD_EXC_RATE , A.LOC_EXC_RATE,A.USD_LOC_RATE , A.DUE_DATE , A.TERMS_DATE , A.PYMT_TERM , A.PYMT_HOLD_FLAG , D.TRX_ID , D.TRX_NUMBER , D.GL_DATE , D.SOURCE_SYSTEM , D.SOURCE_TRX_NUMBER , D.SOURCE_TRX_ITEM_NUMBER , D.CURRENCY_CODE , D.ENTERED_TRX_AMOUNT , D.KRW_TRX_AMOUNT , D.USD_TRX_AMOUNT , D.DUE_DATE , D.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID , D.CUSTOMER_NUMBER , D.CUSTOMER_NAME , D.COUNTRY , D.PORT_CODE , D.COMMENTS , D.CREATED_USER , D.SEGMENT1 , D.SEGMENT2 , D.SEGMENT3 , D.SEGMENT4 , D.SEGMENT5 , D.SEGMENT6 , D.SEGMENT7 , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE_USD , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_USD , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_USD , D.IF_TYPE_I FROM EAR_IF_TRX_BALANCE_V D, OTC_SA_HEAD C, OTC_SA_DETAIL A WHERE A.SA_NO = C.SA_NO AND A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO = D.TRX_NUMBER AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} AND a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '110902' , '110903' , '110907' , '110912' , '110913' )

nvl( d.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as entered_amt , ( nvl( d.usd_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( d.usd_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , ( nvl( d.krw_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( d.krw_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as won_amt , a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no , a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct , c.sa_no , a.stl_flag , a.stl_vsl_code , a.stl_voy_no , a.stl_erp_slip_no , a.usd_sa_amt , a.loc_sa_amt , a.krw_sa_amt , a.stl_port_code , a.remark , a.curcy_code , a.exc_date , a.exc_rate_type , a.usd_exc_rate , a.loc_exc_rate , a.usd_loc_rate , a.due_date , a.terms_date , a.pymt_term , a.pymt_hold_flag from EAR_IF_INVOICE_BALANCE_V d , otc_sa_head c , otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO = d.INVOICE_NUMBER and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '210403' , '210405' , '210402' , '210701' , '210499' ) union all select d.receipt_id , d.receipt_number , d.gl_date , NULL , NULL , NULL , d.currency_code , d.entered_receipt_amount , d.entered_balance_amount , d.entered_pending_amount , d.krw_receipt_amount , d.krw_balance_amount , d.krw_pending_amount , d.usd_receipt_amount , NULL , NULL , NULL , d.customer_unique_id , d.customer_number , d.customer_name , d.country , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , d.exchange_rate_type_krw , d.exchange_rate_date_krw , d.exchange_rate_krw , d.exchange_rate_type_usd , d.exchange_rate_date_usd , d.exchange_rate_usd , NULL , d.receipt_book_number , d.paymnet_user , d.comments , d.created_user , d.payment_method , d.vessel_code , d.voyage_no , a.stl_cntr_acc_code , c.op_team_code , c.cntr_team_code , ACC_NAME_FUNC( a.stl_cntr_acc_code ) as stl_acc_name , a.curcy_code as currency_code , ( nvl( d.entered_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( d.entered_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as entered_amt , ( nvl( d.usd_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( d.usd_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , ( nvl( d.krw_balance_amount , 0 ) - nvl( d.krw_pending_amount , 0 ) ) as won_amt , a.stl_erp_slip_no as slip_no , a.stl_gl_acc_code as gl_acct , c.sa_no , a.stl_flag , a.stl_vsl_code , a.stl_voy_no , a.stl_erp_slip_no , a.usd_sa_amt , a.loc_sa_amt , a.krw_sa_amt , a.stl_port_code , a.remark , a.curcy_code , a.exc_date , a.exc_rate_type , a.usd_exc_rate , a.loc_exc_rate , a.usd_loc_rate , a.due_date , a.terms_date , a.pymt_term , a.pymt_hold_flag from EAR_IF_receipt_BALANCE_V d , otc_sa_head c , otc_sa_detail a where a.sa_no = c.sa_no AND a.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO = d.RECEIPT_NUMBER and a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '210403' , '210405' , '210402' , '210701' , '210499' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerSettleApUnSubmitSearch1 */
SELECT /*+ PUSH_PRED(D) */ , A.STL_CNTR_ACC_CODE , C.OP_TEAM_CODE , C.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , ACC_NAME_FUNC(A.STL_CNTR_ACC_CODE) AS STL_ACC_NAME , A.CURCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE , (NVL(D.ENTERED_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.ENTERED_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS ENTERED_AMT , (NVL(D.USD_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.USD_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS USD_AMT , (NVL(D.KRW_BALANCE_AMOUNT,0)- NVL(D.KRW_PENDING_AMOUNT,0)) AS WON_AMT , A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO AS SLIP_NO , A.STL_GL_ACC_CODE AS GL_ACCT , C.SA_NO , A.STL_FLAG , A.STL_VSL_CODE , A.STL_VOY_NO , A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO , A.USD_SA_AMT , A.LOC_SA_AMT , A.KRW_SA_AMT , A.STL_PORT_CODE , A.REMARK , A.CURCY_CODE , A.EXC_DATE , A.EXC_RATE_TYPE , A.USD_EXC_RATE , A.LOC_EXC_RATE , A.USD_LOC_RATE , A.DUE_DATE , A.TERMS_DATE , A.PYMT_TERM , A.PYMT_HOLD_FLAG , D.TRX_ID , D.TRX_NUMBER , D.GL_DATE , D.SOURCE_SYSTEM , D.SOURCE_TRX_NUMBER , D.SOURCE_TRX_ITEM_NUMBER , D.CURRENCY_CODE , D.ENTERED_TRX_AMOUNT , D.KRW_TRX_AMOUNT , D.USD_TRX_AMOUNT , D.DUE_DATE , D.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID , D.CUSTOMER_NUMBER , D.CUSTOMER_NAME , D.COUNTRY , D.PORT_CODE , D.COMMENTS , D.CREATED_USER , D.SEGMENT1 , D.SEGMENT2 , D.SEGMENT3 , D.SEGMENT4 , D.SEGMENT5 , D.SEGMENT6 , D.SEGMENT7 , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_KRW , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE_USD , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE_USD , D.EXCHANGE_RATE_USD , D.IF_TYPE_I FROM EAR_IF_TRX_BALANCE_V D, OTC_SA_HEAD C, OTC_SA_DETAIL A WHERE A.SA_NO = C.SA_NO AND A.STL_ERP_SLIP_NO = D.TRX_NUMBER AND a.sa_no = #{saNo} and a.stl_gl_acc_code IN ( '110502' , '110503' , '110599' )

/* OTCSADetail.saOffhireBunkerPriceInitSelect */
SELECT A.* , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , B.CP_DATE , B.FROM_DATE , B.TO_DATE , B.DAY_HIRE , B.HIRE_DUR , B.ADDR_COMM_RATE FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A , OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL B WHERE A.CP_ITEM_NO = B.CP_ITEM_NO AND A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInCode} AND B.CP_ITEM_SEQ = ( SELECT MIN( CP_ITEM_SEQ ) FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_DETAIL WHERE CP_ITEM_NO = A.CP_ITEM_NO )

/* OTCSADetail.saOwnerACBunkerInitSearch */
SELECT A.CP_ITEM_NO , A.BLST_BONUS , A.CVE , A.VOY_NO , A.APLY_TIME_FLAG , A.CNTR_NO , A.LAY_CAN_FROM_DATE , A.CNTR_ACC_CODE , A.LAY_CAN_TO_DATE , A.BANK_NAT_CODE , A.OP_TEAM_CODE , A.WTH_TAX_FLAG , A.REDLY_NOTICE1 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE , A.REDLY_NOTICE2 , A.BROK_COMM_RATE2 , A.REDLY_NOTICE3 , A.FO_PRICE , A.REDLY_NOTICE4 , A.ILOHC , A.REDLY_NOTICE5 , A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE6 , A.NAT_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE7 , A.BROK_ACC_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE8 , A.ADTNL_COMM_RATE , A.REDLY_NOTICE9 , A.VSL_CODE , A.REDLY_NOTICE10 , A.DO_PRICE , A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE , A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 , A.SYS_CRE_DATE , A.SYS_CRE_USER_ID , A.SYS_UPD_DATE , A.SYS_UPD_USER_ID , A.BANK_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.BANK_NAT_CODE ) AS BANK_NAT_NAME , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( A.NAT_CODE ) AS NAT_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.OP_TEAM_CODE ) AS OP_TEAM_NAME , TEAM_INFO_FUNC( A.CNTR_TEAM_CODE ) AS CNTR_TEAM_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS CNTR_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME , ACC_NAME_FUNC( A.BROK_ACC_CODE2 ) AS BROK_ACC_NAME2 , VSL_NAME_FUNC( A.VSL_CODE ) AS VSL_NAME , Cntr_Name_Func( A.CNTR_NO ) AS CNTR_NAME , ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) AS ACC_NAT_CODE , NAT_ENG_NAME_FUNC( ACC_NATION_FUNC( A.CNTR_ACC_CODE ) ) AS ACC_NAT_NAME FROM OTC_CP_ITEM_HEAD A WHERE A.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND A.VOY_NO = #{voyNo} AND A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtinCd}

/* OTCSADetail.saAddCommSearch */
SELECT V.SA_NO , V.VAT_FLAG , V.ORG_VAT_NO , V.SA_RATE , V.USD_SA_AMT , V.USD_VAT_SA_AMT , V.KRW_SA_AMT , V.KRW_VAT_SA_AMT , V.VOY_NO FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL V WHERE V.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND V.trsact_code = 'I054'

/* OTCSADetail.saWithTaxInvoiceInsert3 */
SELECT sum( nvl( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , sum( nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_head a, otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '1' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and a.cht_in_out_code = c.own_vsl_category and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002') and a.sa_no = #{with_sa_no}

/* OTCSADetail.saWithTaxInvoiceInsert4 */
SELECT sum( nvl( b.usd_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.usd_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as usd_amt , sum( nvl( b.krw_sa_amt , 0 ) ) +sum( nvl( b.krw_vat_sa_amt , 0 ) ) as krw_amt from otc_sa_head a, otc_sa_detail b, ccd_trsact_type_m c where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and b.trsact_code = c.trsact_code and c.o_sa_rpt_debit_credit = '2' and c.som_system_type ='SOMO' and a.cht_in_out_code = c.own_vsl_category and b.trsact_code not in ( 'L001' , 'L002') and a.sa_no = #{with_sa_no}

/* OTCSADetail.saHeadWthHireBalReuceRateUpdate */
SELECT count( a.sa_no ) saCnt from otc_sa_head a , otc_sa_detail b where a.sa_no = b.sa_no and a.sa_no = #{sa_no} and a.wth_flag = 'Y' and a.cht_in_out_code = 'T' and a.cancel_flag = 'N' and b.trsact_code in ( 'A001' , 'A002' , 'A006' , 'A007' , 'G001' , 'G002' , 'G003' , 'G004' , 'H001' , 'H002' , 'H009' , 'H010' , 'H005' , 'H011' , 'I003' , 'I004' , 'I005' , 'I071' , 'I072' , 'I073' )

/* OTCSADetail.SoaVsCBDurationCheck */
SELECT M.DIVIDED_GROUP , M.TRSACT_CODE , TRSACT_NAME_FUNC( 'SOMO' , 'T' , M.TRSACT_CODE ) TRSACT_NAME , M.FAIL_ITEM , M.PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE , MAX( T.FAIL_ITEM ) FAIL_ITEM , MAX( T.PASS_ITEM ) PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT K.DIVIDED_GROUP , K.TRSACT_CODE , DECODE( K.IS_VALID , 'FAIL' , 'FAIL' , '' ) AS FAIL_ITEM , DECODE( K.IS_VALID , 'PASS' , 'PASS' , '' ) AS PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID FROM ( SELECT SS.DIVIDED_GROUP , SS.TRSACT_CODE , SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE , SS.RECALC_TO_DATE , SS.VOY_STRT_DATE , SS.VOY_END_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ( SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE >= SS.VOY_STRT_DATE and SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE <= SS.VOY_END_DATE ) or ( SS.RECALC_TO_DATE >= SS.VOY_STRT_DATE and SS.RECALC_TO_DATE <= SS.VOY_END_DATE ) or ( SS.VOY_STRT_DATE >= SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE and SS.VOY_STRT_DATE <= SS.RECALC_TO_DATE ) or ( SS.VOY_END_DATE >= SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE and SS.VOY_END_DATE <= SS.RECALC_TO_DATE ) ) THEN 'PASS' WHEN ( SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE IS NULL OR SS.RECALC_TO_DATE IS NULL ) THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END IS_VALID FROM ( SELECT ZZ.DIVIDED_GROUP , ZZ.TRSACT_CODE , ZZ.RECALC_FROM_DATE , ZZ.RECALC_TO_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ZZ.SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF < 0 AND ZZ.SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF >= -0.5 ) THEN DECODE( CNT , 0 , ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE - 0.5 , ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE ) ELSE ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE END VOY_STRT_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ZZ.SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF > 0 AND ZZ.SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF <= 0.5 ) THEN DECODE( CNT , 0 , ZZ.VOY_END_DATE +0.5 , ZZ.VOY_END_DATE ) ELSE ZZ.VOY_END_DATE END VOY_END_DATE FROM ( SELECT Z.DIVIDED_GROUP , Z.TRSACT_CODE , Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , Z.RECALC_TO_DATE , Z.VOY_STRT_DATE , Z.VOY_END_DATE , DECODE( Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , NULL , 0 , SOA_CB_DURATION_INCLUDE_CNT( Z.CNTR_NO , Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , Z.RECALC_TO_DATE ) ) AS CNT , ( Z.RECALC_TO_DATE - Z.VOY_STRT_DATE ) as SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF , ( Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE - Z.VOY_END_DATE ) as SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF FROM ( SELECT SOA.CNTR_NO , SOA.TRSACT_CODE , to_date( to_char( SOA.RECALC_FROM_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) RECALC_FROM_DATE , to_date( to_char( SOA.RECALC_TO_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) RECALC_TO_DATE , SOA.DIVIDED_GROUP , to_date( to_char( CB.VOY_STRT_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) as VOY_STRT_DATE , to_date( to_char( CB.VOY_END_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) as VOY_END_DATE , CB.VOYAGE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT H.SA_NO , H.VSL_CODE , H.VOY_NO , DECODE( H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , 'T' , 'T' , 'C' , 'T' , 'O' ) AS CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , H.STEP_NO , H.CNTR_NO , D.TRSACT_CODE , D.SA_RATE_DUR , D.LOC_SA_AMT , D.USD_SA_AMT , D.KRW_SA_AMT , D.FROM_DATE , D.TO_DATE , CASE WHEN( D.FROM_DATE <= D.TO_DATE ) THEN D.FROM_DATE ELSE D.TO_DATE END RECALC_FROM_DATE , CASE WHEN( D.FROM_DATE <= D.TO_DATE ) THEN D.TO_DATE ELSE D.FROM_DATE END RECALC_TO_DATE , ROWNUM AS DIVIDED_GROUP FROM OTC_SA_HEAD H , OTC_SA_DETAIL D WHERE H.SA_NO = D.SA_NO AND H.STEP_NO <> 0 AND D.TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A006' , 'A007' , 'A008' , 'A009' , 'H009' , 'H010' , 'I071' , 'I072' , 'I073' , 'A003' ) AND D.USD_SA_AMT <> 0 AND H.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND H.VOY_NO = #{VoyNo} AND H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInOut} AND H.STEP_NO = #{stepNo} ) SOA , CB_ALL_VOY_INFO_ADJUST_V CB WHERE SOA.VSL_CODE = CB.VSL_CODE AND SOA.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = CB.VOYAGE_FLAG AND SOA.CNTR_NO = CB.CNTR_NO ) Z ) ZZ ) SS ) S GROUP BY S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID ORDER BY S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID ) K ) T GROUP BY T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE ORDER BY T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE ) M WHERE M.FAIL_ITEM = 'FAIL' AND M.PASS_ITEM IS NULL ORDER BY M.DIVIDED_GROUP , M.TRSACT_CODE

/* OTCSADetail.soaCbDetailDivide */
SELECT DISTINCT A.VSL_CODE , A.VOY_NO , A.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , A.STEP_NO , A.CNTR_NO , A.SA_NO FROM OTC_SA_HEAD A , OTC_SA_DETAIL B WHERE A.SA_NO = B.SA_NO AND nvl( a.cancel_flag , 'N' ) <> 'Y' AND A.STEP_NO <> 0 AND TO_CHAR( a.posting_date , 'YYYYMMDD' ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{start_date} AND A.SA_NO not in ( SELECT m.SA_NO FROM OTC_SA_EXCEPT_LIST_TMP m WHERE NVL( ATTRIBUTE5 , 'N' ) = 'Y' )

/* OTCSADetail.SoaVsCBDurationCheck2 */
SELECT M.DIVIDED_GROUP , M.TRSACT_CODE , TRSACT_NAME_FUNC( 'SOMO' , 'T' , M.TRSACT_CODE ) TRSACT_NAME , M.FAIL_ITEM , M.PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE , MAX( T.FAIL_ITEM ) FAIL_ITEM , MAX( T.PASS_ITEM ) PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT K.DIVIDED_GROUP , K.TRSACT_CODE , DECODE( K.IS_VALID , 'FAIL' , 'FAIL' , '' ) AS FAIL_ITEM , DECODE( K.IS_VALID , 'PASS' , 'PASS' , '' ) AS PASS_ITEM FROM ( SELECT S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID FROM ( SELECT SS.DIVIDED_GROUP , SS.TRSACT_CODE , SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE , SS.RECALC_TO_DATE , SS.VOY_STRT_DATE , SS.VOY_END_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ( SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE >= SS.VOY_STRT_DATE and SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE <= SS.VOY_END_DATE ) or ( SS.RECALC_TO_DATE >= SS.VOY_STRT_DATE and SS.RECALC_TO_DATE <= SS.VOY_END_DATE ) or ( SS.VOY_STRT_DATE >= SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE and SS.VOY_STRT_DATE <= SS.RECALC_TO_DATE ) or ( SS.VOY_END_DATE >= SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE and SS.VOY_END_DATE <= SS.RECALC_TO_DATE ) ) THEN 'PASS' WHEN ( SS.RECALC_FROM_DATE IS NULL OR SS.RECALC_TO_DATE IS NULL ) THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END IS_VALID FROM ( SELECT ZZ.DIVIDED_GROUP , ZZ.TRSACT_CODE , ZZ.RECALC_FROM_DATE , ZZ.RECALC_TO_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ZZ.SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF < 0 AND ZZ.SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF >= -0.5 ) THEN DECODE( CNT , 0 , ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE - 0.5 , ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE ) ELSE ZZ.VOY_STRT_DATE END VOY_STRT_DATE , CASE WHEN ( ZZ.SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF > 0 AND ZZ.SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF <= 0.5 ) THEN DECODE( CNT , 0 , ZZ.VOY_END_DATE +0.5 , ZZ.VOY_END_DATE ) ELSE ZZ.VOY_END_DATE END VOY_END_DATE FROM ( SELECT Z.DIVIDED_GROUP , Z.TRSACT_CODE , Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , Z.RECALC_TO_DATE , Z.VOY_STRT_DATE , Z.VOY_END_DATE , DECODE( Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , NULL , 0 , SOA_CB_DURATION_INCLUDE_CNT( Z.CNTR_NO , Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE , Z.RECALC_TO_DATE ) ) AS CNT , ( Z.RECALC_TO_DATE - Z.VOY_STRT_DATE ) as SOA_TO_CB_STRT_DIFF , ( Z.RECALC_FROM_DATE - Z.VOY_END_DATE ) as SOA_FROM_CB_END_DIFF FROM ( SELECT SOA.CNTR_NO , SOA.TRSACT_CODE , to_date( to_char( SOA.RECALC_FROM_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) RECALC_FROM_DATE , to_date( to_char( SOA.RECALC_TO_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) RECALC_TO_DATE , SOA.DIVIDED_GROUP , to_date( to_char( CB.VOY_STRT_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) as VOY_STRT_DATE , to_date( to_char( CB.VOY_END_DATE , 'yyyymmddhh24mi' ) , 'yyyymmddhh24miss' ) as VOY_END_DATE , CB.VOYAGE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT H.SA_NO , H.VSL_CODE , H.VOY_NO , DECODE( H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , 'T' , 'T' , 'C' , 'T' , 'O' ) AS CHT_IN_OUT_CODE , H.STEP_NO , H.CNTR_NO , D.TRSACT_CODE , D.SA_RATE_DUR , D.LOC_SA_AMT , D.USD_SA_AMT , D.KRW_SA_AMT , D.FROM_DATE , D.TO_DATE , CASE WHEN( D.FROM_DATE <= D.TO_DATE ) THEN D.FROM_DATE ELSE D.TO_DATE END RECALC_FROM_DATE , CASE WHEN( D.FROM_DATE <= D.TO_DATE ) THEN D.TO_DATE ELSE D.FROM_DATE END RECALC_TO_DATE , ROWNUM AS DIVIDED_GROUP FROM OTC_SA_HEAD H , OTC_SA_DETAIL D WHERE H.SA_NO = D.SA_NO AND H.STEP_NO <> 0 AND D.TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A006' , 'A007' , 'A008' , 'A009' , 'H009' , 'H010' , 'I071' , 'I072' , 'I073' , 'A001' , 'A002' , 'A004' , 'A005' , 'H001' , 'H002' , 'I003' , 'I004' , 'I005' ) AND D.USD_SA_AMT <> 0 AND H.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} AND H.VOY_NO = #{VoyNo} AND H.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = #{chtInOut} AND H.STEP_NO = #{stepNo} ) SOA , CB_ALL_VOY_INFO_ADJUST_V CB WHERE SOA.VSL_CODE = CB.VSL_CODE AND SOA.CHT_IN_OUT_CODE = CB.VOYAGE_FLAG AND SOA.CNTR_NO = CB.CNTR_NO ) Z ) ZZ ) SS ) S GROUP BY S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID ORDER BY S.DIVIDED_GROUP , S.TRSACT_CODE , S.IS_VALID ) K ) T GROUP BY T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE ORDER BY T.DIVIDED_GROUP , T.TRSACT_CODE ) M WHERE M.FAIL_ITEM = 'FAIL' AND M.PASS_ITEM IS NULL ORDER BY M.DIVIDED_GROUP , M.TRSACT_CODE

/* OTCSADetail.getCBmaxVoyNo */
SELECT max( a.VSL_CODE ) cb_vsl_code , max( a.VOY_NO ) cb_voy , b.cntr_no , b.cht_in_out_code , b.vsl_code sa_vsl_code , b.voy_no from CB_ALL_VOY_INFO_ADJUST_V a , otc_sa_head b where a.VSL_CODE(+) = b.vsl_code and a.CNTR_NO(+) = b.cntr_no and a.VOYAGE_FLAG(+) = decode( b.cht_in_out_code , 'T' , 'T' , 'O' ) and b.VSL_CODE = #{vslCode} and b.CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} and b.cht_in_out_code = #{chtInOut} group by b.cntr_no , b.cht_in_out_code , b.vsl_code , b.voy_no

/* OTCSADetail.isBallastPendingAmt */
SELECT TRX_NUMBER from EAR_IF_TRX_BALANCE_V where SOURCE_SYSTEM = 'SOMO' AND gl_date <= to_date( #{posting_date} , 'yyyymmdd' ) AND SUBSTR( IF_TYPE_ID , 3 , 5 ) = 'J010' AND SEGMENT3 = '110902' AND SEGMENT4 = #{vslCode} and source_trx_number in ( select T.SA_NO from otc_sa_head T WHERE T.CNTR_NO IN ( select M.CNTR_NO from otc_sa_head m where m.sa_no = #{saNo} ) ) AND ( nvl( ENTERED_BALANCE_AMOUNT , 0 ) - nvl( ENTERED_PENDING_AMOUNT , 0 ) ) <> 0

/* OTCSADetail.getOnHireMinFromDate */
SELECT TO_CHAR( MIN( A.FROM_DATE ) , 'YYYYMMDD' ) MIN_FROM_DATE FROM OTC_SA_DETAIL A WHERE A.SA_NO = #{saNo} AND A.TRSACT_CODE IN ( 'A006' ) AND A.USD_SA_AMT <> 0 GROUP BY A.TRSACT_CODE
